name: latch-agent-gateway
author: Troels Anker Jørgensen
description: Compass / Latch — a self-hosted, approval-gated gateway for operating a disposable AI agent worker (OpenClaw) from your phone or desktop, where the control plane holds the secrets and the worker never does.

scripts.test: node test/secret-scan.mjs && node test/run-python-tests.mjs && node test/agent-email.mjs && node test/mcp.mjs && node test/mcp-fingerprint.mjs && node test/schedule.mjs && node test/smoke.mjs
